title: Runtime event payload schemas introduced by this hotfix
description: No persistent storage schema change. Two new runtime-event types reuse the existing RuntimeEventService journal. MessageV2.Assistant fields used during reclaim already exist.

sessionID.description: Session ID of the reclaim site

reclaimedMessageID.description: MessageV2.id of the orphan that was finalized

trigger.description: BumpEpochInput.trigger that triggered detection (always 'daemon_start' under DD-5 predicate)

sessionEntryMissing.description: true iff registry.get(sid) returned undefined at predicate evaluation time

everBumpedSize.description: Snapshot of everBumped.size at emission, for population diagnostics

processUptimeMs.description: performance.now() value as crude process-age signal

Assistant.time.completed.description: Reclaim sets this to Date.now() when finalizing orphan
